attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	 WSP.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID             
	,WSP.MASTER_SOURCE_ID              
	,WSP.THEATRE_CODE                  
	,WSP.SOURCE_TYPE                   
	,WSP.CALENDAR_TYPE                 
	,WSP.SOURCE_NAME                   
	,WSP.REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME         
	,WSP.REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME_INV     
	,WSP.REPORTING_SOURCE_COUNTRY      
	,WSP.DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE         
	,WSP.CONTRACT_EFFECTIVE_DATE       
	,WSP.CONTRACT_OBSOLETE_DATE        
	,WSP.SOURCE_EDI_ID                 
	,WSP.SORT_ORDER                    
	,WSP.SOURCE_DATE_FORMAT            
	,WSP.ACTIVE_FLAG                   
	,WSP.CREATED_BY                    
	,WSP.CREATED_DATE                  
	,WSP.UPDATED_BY                    
	,WSP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
	,WSP.REPORTING_COUNTRY_NAME        
	,WSP.SALESREP_NAME                 
	,WSP.CLAIM_DATE_FORMAT             
	,WSP.CC_CISCO_FOR_CLAIMS           
	,WSP.CC_CISCO_FOR_POS              
	,WSP.CCO_ACCESS                    
	,WSP.DISTI_TYPE                    
	,WSP.SOURCE_ABBR                   
	,WSP.TERRITORY_ID                  
	,WSP.SOURCE_XML_ID                 
	,WSP.SALES_CREDIT                  
	,WSP.PDB_DISTRIBUTOR_SOURCE        
	,WSP.ATTRIBUTE1                    
	,WSP.CREATE_DATETIME               
	,WSP.BATCH_ID                      
	,WSP.ACTION_CODE 
    , 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE	
	,WSP.SALES_TERRITORY_ID  
     ,WSP.DSV_FLAG
     ,WSP.NET_PRICE_FLAG	
	 /* Start : Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
	 ,WSP.SFP_FLAG
FROM $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_SOURCE_PROFILES WSP
WHERE 
WSP.ACTIVE_FLAG IS NULL
/*Modified as part of SFP Dec Rel*/
 OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
				WHERE WSP.SALES_TERRITORY_ID= EST.TERRITORY_ID
				AND EST.GLOBAL_NAME IN ( 'UO' , 'BO' , 'CG' )
				/*AND EST.GLOBAL_NAME='UO'*/)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER  (PARTITION BY  WSP.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID ORDER BY  WSP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC, WSP.ACTIVE_FLAG   DESC )  =1

SELECT  ESP.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID
 	,ESP.SOURCE_NAME 
 	,ESP.REPORTING_SOURCE_COUNTRY
 	,ESP.SOURCE_TYPE
 	,ESP.ACTIVE_FLAG 
 	,ESP.THEATRE_CODE 
 	,ESP.REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME
 	,COALESCE(NICT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'=')
 	,ESP.DISTI_TYPE
 	,ESP.ACTION_CODE
 	,ESP.SALES_TERRITORY_ID
 	,EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 	,COALESCE(WMS.MASTER_SOURCE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS MASTER_SOURCE_NAME
        ,DDA.BID_NUMBER
        ,COALESCE(ECALUT.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999)
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
,USER 
,USER 
 ,ESP.SALESREP_NAME
 ,COALESCE(DDA.COMPANY_CODE,'UNK') AS COMPANY_CODE
 ,COALESCE(ESP.DSV_FLAG,'N') AS DSV_ENABLED_FLG
  ,COALESCE(ESP.NET_PRICE_FLAG,'N') AS NET_PRICE_FLAG
  /* Start : Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
  ,COALESCE(ESP.SFP_FLAG, 'N') AS SOLD_FOR_NET_PRICE_FLG
 FROM
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_WIPS_SOURCE_PROFILES ESP
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN   $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_MASTER_SOURCE WMS
 ON ESP.MASTER_SOURCE_ID = WMS.MASTER_SOURCE_ID
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NICT
  ON  ESP.DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE=NICT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
  AND  NICT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 
 /*Modified as part of SFP Dec Rel*/
 INNER JOIN 
 ( SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY 
   WHERE  GLOBAL_NAME IN ( 'UO' , 'BO' , 'CG' )
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TERRITORY_ID ORDER BY CASE WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 1 WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END ) = 1
 ) EST
 ON SALES_TERRITORY_ID= EST.TERRITORY_ID
/*AND EST.GLOBAL_NAME='UO'*/

LEFT OUTER JOIN  
(SELECT * FROM  $$STGDB.ST_DCA_DISTI_ACCOUNTS 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER  (PARTITION BY  SOURCE_PROFILE_ID ORDER BY  LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC, ACTIVE_FLAG   DESC )  =1
) DDA
ON ESP.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID = DDA.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE  ECALUT
ON ECALUT.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT=DDA.BID_NUMBER
AND BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE ='BILL_TO'
WHERE  1=1 
AND ESP.ACTIVE_FLAG IS NOT NULL

SELECT  
	 SP.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID
 	,SP.SOURCE_NAME 
 	,SP.REPORTING_SOURCE_COUNTRY
 	,SP.SOURCE_TYPE
 	,SP.ACTIVE_FLAG 
 	,SP.THEATRE_CODE 
 	,SP.REPORTING_SOURCE_NAME
 	,COALESCE(NICT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'=')
 	,SP.DISTI_TYPE
 	,SP.ACTION_CODE
 	,SP.SALES_TERRITORY_ID
 	,EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 	,COALESCE(WMS.MASTER_SOURCE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS MASTER_SOURCE_NAME
     ,DDA.BID_NUMBER
     ,COALESCE(ECALUT.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999)
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
,USER 
,USER 
,SP.SALESREP_NAME
,COALESCE(DDA.COMPANY_CODE,'UNK') AS COMPANY_CODE
,COALESCE(SP.DSV_FLAG,'N') AS DSV_ENABLED_FLG
,COALESCE(SP.NET_PRICE_FLAG,'N') AS NET_PRICE_FLAG
/* Start : Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
,COALESCE(SP.SFP_FLAG, 'N') AS SOLD_FOR_NET_PRICE_FLG
 FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_SOURCE_PROFILES SP
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN   $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_MASTER_SOURCE WMS
 ON SP.MASTER_SOURCE_ID = WMS.MASTER_SOURCE_ID
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NICT
  ON  SP.DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE=NICT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
  AND  NICT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 
 /*Modified as part of SFP Dec Rel*/
 INNER JOIN 
 ( SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY 
   WHERE  GLOBAL_NAME IN ( 'UO' , 'BO' , 'CG' )
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TERRITORY_ID ORDER BY CASE WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 1 WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END ) = 1
  ) EST
 ON SALES_TERRITORY_ID= EST.TERRITORY_ID
 /*AND EST.GLOBAL_NAME='UO'*/

LEFT OUTER JOIN   
(SELECT * FROM  $$STGDB.ST_DCA_DISTI_ACCOUNTS 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER  (PARTITION BY  SOURCE_PROFILE_ID ORDER BY  LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC, ACTIVE_FLAG   DESC )  =1
) DDA 
ON SP.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID = DDA.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE ECALUT
ON ECALUT.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT=DDA.BID_NUMBER
AND BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE ='BILL_TO'
WHERE 1=1
 AND SP.ACTIVE_FLAG IS NOT NULL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER  (PARTITION BY  SP.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID ORDER BY  SP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC, SP.ACTIVE_FLAG   DESC )  =1
